title: Consultation: Proposed guideline for Bromoxynil in drinking water - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation: Proposed guideline for Bromoxynil in drinking water

## Current status: Closed
Opened on November 27, 2020 and will close to new input on January 29, 2021.
Find out how to participate in the consultation for the guideline technical document on Bromoxynil in drinking water.

## Join in: how to participate
Read  the consultation  document and submit your comments to the Water and Air  Quality Bureau, Health Canada. Include the title of the consultation document  on which you're commenting.
Send  an email to hc.water-eau.sc@canada.ca with your input or comments.
Send  a letter with your input or comments to the address in the contact  information section. All comments must be received by January  29, 2021
